parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "temperature": 0.1,
  "max_tokens": 300,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are an AI classifier for ArcVault, a B2B software company. Classify incoming customer requests. Return ONLY a valid JSON object with these fields:
- category: one of [Bug Report, Feature Request, Billing Issue, Technical Question, Incident/Outage]
- priority: one of [Low, Medium, High]
- confidence_score: integer 0-100

Priority rules:
- High: system down, outages, billing overcharges, security issues, multiple users affected
- Medium: bugs affecting one user, billing questions, time-sensitive requests
- Low: feature requests, general questions, non-urgent inquiries

Confidence rules:
- 90-100: clearly matches one category
- 70-89: likely matches but some ambiguity
- Below 70: vague or could fit multiple categories

Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no explanation."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Source: {{ $json.body.source }}
Message: {{ $json.body.message }}"
    }
  ]
}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'processed', request_id: $('Steps 4+6 — Routing & Escalation').first().json.request_id, destination: $('Steps 4+6 — Routing & Escalation').first().json.routing.destination_queue, escalated: $('Steps 4+6 — Routing & Escalation').first().json.escalation.escalation_flag }) }}
